case_title: VELOCITY INVESTMENTS, LLC/ PROVIDIAN VS. DOUGLAS A. HERMAN

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF VELOCITY INVESTMENTS, LLC/ PROVIDIAN AS TO DEFENDANT HERMAN, DOUGLAS A. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
